features: 【USB C to 3.5mm Jack Adapter】USB C to aux adapter is designed for audio devices so you can enjoy music, watch movies, play games, make clear calls, and more. (NOTE: For USB C smartphones with a 3.5mm audio jack,Volume control is may not supported for Mac.)

【Wide Compatibility】Our usb c headphones adapter is compatible with most USB C devices: Samsung Galaxy S23 S22 S22 S21 S21 S20 S21 S20 Ultra and more, HUAWEI Mate 30/30 Pro/20/20 Pro and more, Google Pixel 6Pro 6A 6 5 4 3 2 XL and more, Pad Mini 6 Pad Pro Pad Air and more, Mi 12 11 10 9 and more.

【Upgraded Materials】Robust aluminum housing with corrosion and oxidation resistance. Thickened copper core protects the audio signal from interference during transmission and increases service life. High-strength Nylon braided material with over 15000+ tests repeated plugging.

【Hi-Fi Sound Performance】USB C to 3.5mm jack with integrated DAC chip enabled up to 96kHz / 24bit, converts digital audio signals to analog audio signals without compressing the signal, perfectly capturing every note signal and appearing. Enables you to enjoy the original sound quality of your music, without the noise.

【Easy to Carry】Simply extend to the jack connection, just plug and play. It has a mini and compact size. Easy to store in your pocket or travel bag and take with you. Can be used in headphones, earbuds, speakers, cars, etc. Suitable for home, business, factory, travel, camping, sports, and other scenarios, (NOTE: In order to ensure the effect of use, please ensure that the headset is fully inserted into the interface of the adapter.)
